title: NoHunger
description: The hunger bar is always full + with little extra settings
body:
![Field with Sundown](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90d09a2935598de773e9c2e9ffa05a9310eb1a10.png)
# 🍽️ NoHunger – Never Worry About Hunger Again!

**Requirements: [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api), [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config), [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)**

⚡ About the Mod

Tired of stopping to eat every two minutes? NoHunger changes the way you play Minecraft. Build, run, and explore freely without your hunger bar slowing you down! Health regeneration is slightly increased for balance, keeping gameplay smooth and fair.

Want to increase the difficulty a bit? Try **Survival Campfire** mode.
_________________________________________________________________________________________

✅ **Fully compatible with other food mods.**

🔧 Four powerful modes, configurable via Mod Menu:

[Click for preview](https://modrinth.com/mod/nohungermod/gallery)

- Off (Vanilla) – Minecraft works as usual.

- Special Foods Only – Only special food effects apply; regular food is ignored.

- Everything Edible – Eat anything: cakes, fruits, bread, and more.
  
- Nothing Edible – Food won’t help; you’ll need other strategies.

- **NEW** Hunger in **Peaceful** is enabled

- **NEW** Enable/disable Hungerbar

- **NEW** Survival Campfire: You can only eat near at a Campfire
_________________________________________________________________________________________

❤️**Why You’ll Love It**

- No hunger loss in any game mode. (Unless you want to change it.)

- Fully customizable to suit your playstyle.

- Perfect for long building sessions, epic adventures, or survival without constant snack breaks.
_________________________________________________________________________________________

Available Languages:

[>>>language<<<](https://github.com/ZaryonDE/nohungermod/blob/master/README.md)
